title: calyptranthes pallens
intro: Calyptranthes pallens, also known as the pale calyptranthes, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Calyptranthes pallens include its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to provide health benefits like reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and improving respiratory health.
